creator: venkata.rmm@gmail.com
text:
am Trying to install 'mail' on my raspberry pi3 on FreeBSD.

encountered with below error. suspecting this error due to NEON instruction set.

Similar issue faced with libgcrypto, and found patch on Freebsd then libgcrypto worked..

could some one please provide similar path for this..

Thank you for your support.
------------------------------------------------------------------------
root@rpi3:/usr/ports/graphics/jpeg-turbo # uname -a
FreeBSD rpi3 12.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 12.0-CURRENT #0 r313109M: Thu Feb  2 16:16:39 MST 2017     raspberry@hive.raspbsd.org:/usr/home/brd/rpi3/crochet/work/obj/arm64.aarch64/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  arm64 

------------------------------------------------------------------------
